title: Not Ya Mama's Cooking — Mexican Catering Restaurant Website

requirements.summary: Apply a professional Mexican-inspired theme with warm vibrant colors (deep reds, earthy oranges, golden yellows, dark greens), bold typography, textured backgrounds, and a festive yet upscale restaurant aesthetic consistently across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: Warm Mexican-inspired color palette (deep reds, earthy oranges, golden yellows) is used consistently
Typography is bold and professional throughout
Overall design feels upscale yet festive

file_operations.description: Define custom CSS variables for the Mexican-inspired color palette (deep reds, earthy oranges, golden yellows, dark greens) and apply global typography styles with bold font weights and festive yet professional character
Extend Tailwind theme with custom colors matching the Mexican palette (warmRed, earthyOrange, goldenYellow, darkGreen), configure bold font family variants, and add textured background utilities

requirements.summary: Display the generated logo prominently in the header/hero area using the file frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x400.png
acceptanceCriteria: Logo appears in the site header and/or hero section
Logo is rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x400.png

file_operations.description: Create a Header component that displays the logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x400.png prominently in the header area with appropriate sizing and positioning
Import and render the Header component at the top of the application layout

requirements.summary: Implement a sticky header that automatically hides when scrolling down and reappears when scrolling up with smooth animations
acceptanceCriteria: Header is visible at the top of the page on load
Header slides out of view when the user scrolls down
Header reappears smoothly when the user scrolls back up
Transition is smooth/animated

file_operations.description: Create a custom React hook that detects scroll direction (up/down) and returns the current direction state for controlling header visibility
Integrate the useScrollDirection hook to toggle header visibility with smooth CSS transitions (transform: translateY) based on scroll direction, making it sticky and auto-hiding

requirements.summary: Add a hamburger menu icon in the top-right corner that opens a navigation drawer listing all services (Catering Services, Street Tacos — Chicken & Beef, Burritos) with smooth scroll-to-section and close-on-click behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Hamburger icon (≡) is visible in the top-right corner of the header
Clicking the icon opens a navigation menu/drawer
Menu lists all services: Catering Services, Street Tacos (Chicken & Beef), Burritos
Clicking a menu item scrolls to the corresponding section
Menu closes on outside click or item selection

file_operations.description: Create a MobileMenu component with a hamburger icon button (three horizontal lines) that toggles a navigation drawer/dropdown, listing navigation links (Catering Services, Street Tacos, Burritos), implementing smooth scroll-to-section on click and close-on-outside-click behavior
Integrate the MobileMenu component in the top-right corner of the Header

requirements.summary: Create a menu/food showcase section featuring Chicken Street Tacos, Beef Street Tacos, and Burritos with cards containing titles, descriptions, and generated food images, emphasizing street tacos as the signature item
acceptanceCriteria: Section titled 'Our Menu' or equivalent is present
Chicken Street Tacos card is displayed with image and description
Beef Street Tacos card is displayed with image and description
Burritos card is displayed with image and description
Street tacos are visually emphasized (e.g., featured/larger card or 'signature dish' badge)
Food images are rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Create a MenuSection component displaying an 'Our Menu' heading and three menu item cards: (1) Chicken Street Tacos using frontend/public/assets/generated/chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png, (2) Beef Street Tacos using frontend/public/assets/generated/beef-tacos.dim_800x600.png, (3) Burritos using frontend/public/assets/generated/burrito.dim_800x600.png. Each card includes a title, appetizing description, and image. Visually emphasize street tacos as signature items with larger cards or a 'Signature Dish' badge
Import and render the MenuSection component with an appropriate section ID for scroll-to navigation

requirements.summary: Create a catering services section highlighting catering for events in the Phoenix, Arizona area with a list of offerings and a call-to-action to contact for bookings
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Catering' or 'Catering Services' section is present
Phoenix, Arizona area is explicitly mentioned
A call-to-action (e.g., button or link) leads to the contact section

file_operations.description: Create a CateringSection component with a 'Catering Services' heading, highlighting that Not Ya Mama's Cooking offers catering for events in the Phoenix, Arizona area. Include a description of catering offerings and use the banner image from frontend/public/assets/generated/catering-banner.dim_1200x500.png. Add a call-to-action button that scrolls to the contact section
Import and render the CateringSection component with an appropriate section ID for scroll-to navigation

requirements.summary: Add a contact section displaying Jasmine Cota as the contact name and (480) 091-4039 as a clickable tel: link with a warm inviting message encouraging catering inquiries
acceptanceCriteria: Contact section displays name: Jasmine Cota
Contact section displays phone: (480) 091-4039 as a clickable tel: link
Section includes a friendly call-to-action message

file_operations.description: Create a ContactSection component displaying the contact name 'Jasmine Cota' and phone number '(480) 091-4039' as a clickable tel: link (tel:4800914039). Include a warm, inviting message encouraging visitors to reach out for catering inquiries
Import and render the ContactSection component with an appropriate section ID for scroll-to navigation

requirements.summary: Remove all 'Built by Caffeine AI' text, attribution, or branding from the footer and every other section of the site
acceptanceCriteria: No 'Built by Caffeine AI' text or attribution appears anywhere on the page
Footer only contains relevant business information

file_operations.description: Create a Footer component containing only relevant business information (business name, copyright) with no 'Built by Caffeine AI' or any Caffeine AI branding
Import and render the Footer component at the bottom of the application layout, ensuring no Caffeine AI attribution appears anywhere in the main app structure
